issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' for a main deck card effect, not 'Activated'. Main effects trigger when the card is played.
Missing condition to check if DON count on your field ≤ opponent's DON count. Should include 'HasAttachedDon' comparison condition.
Action should be 'Rest' (to set a card active means to rest it), not 'SearchDeck'. The card is already on the field and needs to be rested.
Filter must specify type 'Foxy', not 'Any'. Action must target up to 1 [Foxy] card on the field.
Destination should not be 'board' for a Rest action. Rest affects cards already on the field.
